# Regenerated by `pnpm sitemap`. Set VITE_SITE_URL before build in production.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# SPA client routes only — do not disallow legitimate marketing pages.
# Disallow API if ever co-hosted on the same origin:
Disallow: /api/
